---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tactic, schema, engine, or framework to cover
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What to add**
The engine, framework, schema, or tactic missing from the skill.

**Why it matters**
The SEO/GEO/AEO impact, ideally with a source.

**Source**
Link to official docs / data backing it (verified facts only).
